titleStmt.title: SII 19.408: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 408. (A.R. No. 111 of 1929.) LĀLGUḌI, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT. ON THE EAST WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, SAPTARISHĪŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This records a sale of land, 6 mā and odd in extent, free of taxes by the mahāsabhā of Nityavinītamaṅgalam a brahmadēya in Iḍaiyāṟṟu-nāḍu to the temple of Īśvara-Bhaṭāra at Tiruttavattuṟai, for 30 kaḻañju of gold which had been endowed to the temple for burning a perpetual lamp, by Śankaraṉ Kuṉṟappōḻaṉ of Puttūr in Malai-nāḍu (mentioned in Nos. 363 and 387 above) on behalf of Kōkiḻānaḍigaḷār the daughter of Śēramāṉāṟ (Chēra king). This evidently refers to the queen of Parāntaka I of that name, though she is not specifically referred to as such in the record. Nityavinītamaṅgalam which finds mention already in a record of Āditya I (S.I.I. Vol. XIII. No. 325) should have been so named after the surname ‘Nityavinīta’ of a Pallava ruler, possibly Nandivarman III, an inscription of whom is found in the temple (No. 120 of 1929).

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī (ri) . kopparakecari paṉmaṟkku yāṇṭu
patiṉāṟāvatu Ivvāṇṭu Iṭaiyāṟṟunāṭṭu ti
ruttavattuṟai Īśvabhaṭṭārakarkkuc ceramāṉār ma
kaḷār kokkiḻāṉaṭikaḷār malai nāṭṭup puttūr ca
ṅkaraṉ kuṉṟappoḻaṉ ntāviḷakku Oṉ
ṟiṉukku Iravum pakalum cantirātittaval Erippatāka
k kuṭutta poṉ 3 10 Immuppatiṉkaḻañcu poṉ
ṉum Iṭaiyāṟṟunāṭṭu brahmadeyan nityaviṉi
tamaṅkalattu mahaāsabhaiyom tiruttavattuṟai Īśvarabha
ṣṭārakarkkuc caṅkaraṉ kuṉṟappoḻaṉ Oru nontāviḷakki
ṉukku vaitta poṉ 3 10 muppatiṉkaḻañcu poṉṉum mahāsabhaiyo
ṅ koṇṭa paricāvatu Immuppatiṉ kaḻañcu poṉṉukkun tiruttavattu
ṟai Īśvarabhaṭṭārakarkku vilai (vi)yāvaṇañ ceytukuṭutta nirinilamā
vatu talaimuṭaik kāṟceyyum mitaṉ vaṭavāy Aṟumāvil Iññilamey
Aṭaiyak kiḻaṉmel Āka nilam pama mākāṇiyu Āka nilameṟṟi va� Āṟu
mākkāṇi nilattukku Ellaiyāvatu kiḻpāṟkellai viṟkiṉṟo nilattukku
m Īccuvaraṉ tatta ṉakkaṉ ṉilam nāṉmāvukku meṟkkum teṉpāṟkkellai
puṟavāykkālukku vaṭakku melpāṟkellai ciṟupuṟaivāykkālukku kiḻak
kum vaṭapāṟkellai viṟkiṉṟon nilattukku teṟkku Ivvicaiytta
perunāṉ kellaiyil Akappaṭṭa nilam va�nilamu(u)ṇṇila moḻiviṉṟi I
m muppatiṉkaḻañcu poṉṉuṅ kaiyyile Aṟa Iṭuvittukkoṇṭu Inni
la Aṟumākkāṇi nilamum Iṟaiyiliyāka viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytu niroṭa
ṭṭik kallil veṭṭik kuṭuttom tiruttuvattuṟai Īśvarabhaṭṭārarkku nitya
viṉitamaṅkalattu mahaāsabhaiyom Iññilañcuṭṭi Iṟaiyum E
cvacāṟum ceṉṉīr vennīr Uṭpaṭa Iṟai Iṟātutāka
Iññilañ cuṭṭi vantitu Eppeṟpaṭṭa Iṟaiyuṅ kāttuk kuṭuppomā
ttu mahaāsabhaiyom Itiṟ tiṟampiṟ sabhaiyo
la tevakaṉ mikaḷāyum panmāheśvārāyum ya
ta tūṟṟeṭṭu kāṇamuṉpu niṟ
kilu nillāviṭiluṟ taṇṭamiṭuvatāka Iccuṭṭapaṭṭa taṇṭip
pittu piṉṉaiyum Innilañcuṭṭi vantatu tirttukkuṭuppo
māṉom tiruttuvattuṟai Īśvarabhaṭṭārarkku nityaviṉitamaṅkalattu mā
sabhaiyom Itu panmāheśvara Irakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 19.408 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
